title: Dreamscene Double Throw Blanket for Bed, Luxury Cream Faux Fur Mink Fleece Throw Blanket Super Soft Warm Cosy Throw Over Sofa Fluffy Lightweight Bedspread, 150 x 200cm
features: Fleece Blanket for Bed: The sophisticated cream colour and plush faux fur texture add a luxurious touch to any room. This versatile design complements a variety of décor styles, from modern to traditional, elevating the look of your living space.
150 x 200cm This throw blanket is designed for double beds or as an oversized throw for your sofa, providing generous coverage to keep you snug and cosy all day or night.

Lightweight & Warm: Enjoy a balanced combination of warmth and breathability. This lightweight fleece blanket keeps you comfortably warm without feeling heavy, making it an ideal choice for year-round comfort, no matter the season.

Luxuriously Soft & Cosy: Crafted from premium cream faux fur mink fleece 100% polyester, the double throw blanket offers an ultra-soft, fluffy texture that delivers exceptional comfort and warmth, perfect for lounging on the sofa or adding extra cosiness to your bed.

Easy to Care For & Durable: Machine washable at 40°C for hassle-free maintenance, this fleece throw blanket is designed to maintain its softness, vibrant colour and luxurious feel wash after wash, ensuring long-lasting durability and comfort.
description: From the manufacturer Dreamscene Luxury Faux Fur Throw Multi Purpose Versatile Blanket Crafted by Dreamscene, this blanket is thick, soft and very versatile for use as throw over bed, sofa, couch or settee. Can be rolled up to be used on travel to keep warm and cosy. Soft, thick texture Faux fur material Easy care - machine washable Range of sizes Thick Non-shedding 100% Polyester Soothing to the touch, this range of mink blankets has a texture and feel of thick fur allowing you to comb your fingers through. The reverse side has an ultra soft smooth fabric feel, perfect for the skin in keeping you warm. Made from polyester, this throw is totally animal friendly, and no animals have been harmed in the production. Machine Washable The throw can be washed in a washing machine, meaning it is even easier, more convenient to keep it clean. Warm and Comforting With thick pile, this throw is an ideal way to decorate your bed, throw over a sofa, couch or reading chair - perfect for chilly nights and winter months. Vibrant colours make this the perfect decorative method to complete your room.
